text.title: design-system-success-factors Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for design-system-success-factors as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Component-usage scans count JSX element names, missing semantic equivalents (MyButton wrapping the system Button).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Walk the import graph, not just JSX element names; a wrapper that bypasses tokens looks like adoption but defeats the system.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated component documentation is generic and does not cite real repo examples.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the agent to reference at least one file path from the actual codebase per doc page; generic copy is worse than no doc because it signals the system is maintained but unhelpful.

failure-mode.description: Critic agent hallucinating "missing" components not in the inventory.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provide the full inventory file and require the agent to reference items by ID; name-based references hallucinate items that do not exist.

failure-mode.description: Doc auditor auto-fixes documentation without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confidently incorrect examples are worse than missing ones; doc fixes always require a human reader who knows correct usage.
